calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arnold Evje, Esq., for plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation with manager Fred Bryant. Ryan K. Takemoto, Esq. appeared on behalf of defendant Debra James who is also present.

Settlement Conference Held. Stipulation to Enter Judgment or, Upon Fulfillment of Condition, Dismissal with Prejudice for property located at 540 Jones Street, #508, San Francisco, California signed by parties but not filed. Original retained by plaintiff's counsel. Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not Reported
